To convert the web page to Foxit PDF

This plugin is used to convert the webpages to PDF. Users can set the layout, add watermarks, headers/footers, and apply security settings for the PDF during conversion. Foxit PDF Editor is required to use this plugin. For more information, go to www.foxit.com.
Extension to use digital certificates within webpages

WebPKI is web based component that supports documents digital signing, signature verification and document encryption. 
This product is developed to enable browser signing of documents with user’s digital certificates and it is supported by web browsers, without the need of Java.  

WebPKI offers the following advantages:
  
 -Simple digital signing of documents from a web browser with user’s digital certificates,
  which provides proof of the signer’s identity and document integrity
   -Enables document signing using criptographic devices.
   -Enables detection and verification of existing digital signatures on PDF files
   -Easy integration of signing component into existing web applications
   -Easy configuration of the component to set up trusted issuers, or list of approved signers, or uniquely allowed certificate.
Extensão para assinatura digital no browser

Extensão que possibilita a utilização de certificados digitais em páginas web.

Caso já possuía o Softplan Web Signer instalado, mas na Chrome web store apareça apenas o botão de "Remover do Chrome", siga os passos abaixo para reinstalar a extensão:

1. Clique no botão "Remover do Chrome" para remover a extensão.
2. Após removida, clique no botão "Usar no Chrome" para reinstalar a extensão.

Refresh the page automatically with powerful page monitor features.

Auto Refresh Plus comes in handy to any user who needs to perform automatic web page refresh at certain times efficiently. It also provides content detection support, which is useful when monitoring content included in a dynamic web page.

⭐ Key Features

🔹 Refresh Controls
(1) Predefined Time Intervals
(2) Custom Refresh Interval
(3) Random Interval
(4) Countdown Timer (with scheduling)
(5) Visual Timer (domain-specific position)
(6) Hard Refresh / Bypass Cache
(7) Refresh Count Limit
(8) Stop / Pause / Restart on User Interaction

🔹 URL & Tab Automation
(9) Auto Start URLs
(10) Refresh Predefined URL
(11) Active Tabs List
(12) URL Changes & Redirection Handling
(13) Captcha Detection
(14) Error Page Detection
(15) Prevent System Sleep

🔹 Page Monitor
(16) Page Monitor (Keyword Found / Lost / Change)
(17) Monitoring Modes
(18) Change Detection Method
(19) Predefined Keywords
(20) Keyword Templates
(21) Supported Expressions
(22) Continue Refresh After Detection
(23) Real-Time Detection
(24) Run Detection After Load

🔹 Advanced Monitoring
(25) Custom Area Monitoring
(26) Highlight Detected Keyword
(27) Scroll to Keyword
(28) Auto Click Detected Elements

🔹 Alerts & Notifications
(29) Push Notifications
(30) Email Alerts
(31) Webhook Integration
(32) Window Focus on Detection

🔹 Automation Tools
(33) Custom Scripts
(34) AI Script Generator
(35) Script Marketplace
(36) Hotkeys

🔹 Expression Tools
(37) Ready Expressions
(38) AI Expression Generator

🔹 Account & Sync
(39) Sync Settings
(40) Primary Device
(41) Secondary Devices
(42) Settings Profiles


⭐ Features Detailed explanations

🔹 Refresh Controls

(1) Predefined Time Intervals  
Predefined Time Intervals allow you to quickly select common refresh timings without manually configuring values. This is useful for users who want a fast and simple setup using standard intervals. It ensures consistent refresh behavior and reduces the time required to configure settings.

(2) Custom Refresh Interval  
Custom Refresh Interval gives you full control over refresh timing by allowing you to define exact hours, minutes, and seconds. It supports very short intervals for high-frequency monitoring tasks. This is ideal when precise timing is required for tracking fast-changing content.

(3) Random Interval  
Random Interval refreshes pages at varying times within a defined range. This helps simulate natural browsing behavior and avoids predictable refresh patterns. It is especially useful when monitoring systems where fixed intervals are not recommended.

(4) Countdown Timer  
Countdown Timer allows you to start refresh after a delay or at a specific date and time. It also supports scheduling to run refresh tasks only during selected time windows. This feature is useful for timed events such as sales, ticket releases, or booking openings.

(5) Visual Timer  
Visual Timer displays a live countdown directly on the webpage so you can monitor refresh activity easily. The position of the timer can be customized and is saved per domain. This eliminates the need to open the extension popup repeatedly.

(6) Hard Refresh / Bypass Cache  
Hard Refresh forces the browser to reload content directly from the server instead of using cached data. This ensures that you always get the most up-to-date version of the page. It is essential for real-time monitoring where cached content may cause delays.

(7) Refresh Count Limit  
Refresh Count Limit allows you to define how many times a page should refresh before stopping automatically. This helps prevent unnecessary refresh cycles and reduces system load. It is useful for controlled monitoring tasks.

(8) Stop / Pause / Restart on User Interaction  
This feature automatically pauses or stops the refresh when the user interacts with the page, such as clicking or typing. It prevents interruptions during manual usage. Improved controls also allow you to pause and restart refresh cycles without resetting progress.


🔹 URL & Tab Automation

(9) Auto Start URLs  
Auto Start URLs automatically begin refreshing when specific pages are opened in the browser. It supports wildcard patterns, allowing flexible configuration across multiple pages. This removes the need to manually start refresh each time.

(10) Refresh Predefined URL  
Refresh Predefined URL allows you to refresh a specific page even if it is not actively opened. This enables background monitoring without switching tabs. It is useful for continuously tracking important pages.

(11) Active Tabs List  
Active Tabs List displays all tabs where refresh tasks are currently running. It allows you to view timers, switch between tabs, and manage refresh actions easily. This feature is helpful when handling multiple monitoring sessions.

(12) URL Changes & Redirection Handling  
This feature ensures that refresh continues correctly even when a page redirects or changes its URL. It supports domain-specific configuration for better control. This is especially useful for login pages or dynamic websites.

(13) Captcha Detection  
Captcha Detection identifies when a page shows a captcha challenge during refresh. It stops the refresh process or alerts the user to avoid unnecessary loops. This helps maintain controlled and safe monitoring behavior.

(14) Error Page Detection  
Error Page Detection detects pages like 404 errors or offline states. When such pages are found, the extension can stop refreshing or notify the user. This prevents wasted refresh cycles on broken pages.

(15) Prevent System Sleep  
Prevent System Sleep keeps your system awake while refresh tasks are running. This ensures continuous monitoring even during long sessions. It is particularly useful when running unattended tasks.


🔹 Page Monitor

(16) Page Monitor  
Page Monitor allows you to track changes on a webpage by detecting when specific text appears, disappears, or when any content changes. It works with both keyword-based and full-page monitoring. This makes it a powerful tool for tracking dynamic updates.

(17) Monitoring Modes  
Monitoring Modes allow you to choose between keyword detection and full-page change detection. This flexibility lets you decide how detailed the monitoring should be. It helps optimize performance and accuracy based on your needs.

(18) Change Detection Method  
Change Detection Method lets you monitor changes using either the visible page content or the source code. This provides flexibility for different types of websites. It ensures reliable detection even for hidden or dynamic elements.

(19) Predefined Keywords  
Predefined Keywords allow you to define text that triggers automatic refresh when detected. This works as an event-based automation trigger. It is useful for tracking availability or updates.

(20) Keyword Templates  
Keyword Templates allow you to save commonly used monitoring keywords. This helps speed up setup for repeated tasks. It also ensures consistency across different monitoring sessions.

(21) Supported Expressions  
Supported Expressions include plain text, Regex, CSS selectors, and XPath. This allows both simple and advanced monitoring configurations. It is suitable for beginners as well as technical users.

(22) Continue Refresh After Detection  
This feature allows refresh to continue even after a keyword is detected. It includes an option to skip repeated detections for better efficiency. This is useful for continuous monitoring scenarios.

(23) Real-Time Detection  
Real-Time Detection checks for changes during the refresh process instead of waiting for completion. This significantly reduces detection delay. It is ideal for fast-changing content.

(24) Run Detection After Load  
Run Detection After Load ensures that monitoring starts only after the page content has fully loaded. It supports a user-defined delay in seconds. This improves accuracy for dynamic websites.


🔹 Advanced Monitoring

(25) Custom Area Monitoring  
Custom Area Monitoring allows you to track only a specific section of a webpage. This reduces false alerts caused by unrelated changes. It is useful for large or complex pages.

(26) Highlight Detected Keyword  
Highlight Detected Keyword visually marks the matched text on the page. This makes it easy to locate the detected content. It is especially helpful on long pages.

(27) Scroll to Keyword  
Scroll to Keyword automatically moves the page to the detected content location. This saves time by eliminating manual searching. It improves user experience.

(28) Auto Click Detected Elements  
Auto Click automatically clicks buttons or links when detected. This works with actionable keywords like “Buy Now.” It enables immediate response to events.


🔹 Alerts & Notifications

(29) Push Notifications  
Push Notifications display instant alerts directly in the browser. They work even when the tab is inactive. This helps users stay updated without constant monitoring.

(30) Email Alerts  
Email Alerts send notifications to your email when an event occurs. It requires setting your email in General Settings and enabling it per page. Gmail is recommended for better reliability.

(31) Webhook Integration  
Webhook Integration sends event data to external systems using HTTP requests. It supports platforms like Discord, Slack, and custom APIs. This enables advanced automation workflows.

(32) Window Focus on Detection  
Window Focus automatically brings the browser to the foreground when a change is detected. This ensures you immediately notice important updates. It is useful when working in other applications.


🔹 Automation Tools

(33) Custom Scripts  
Custom Scripts allow you to run JavaScript during refresh or monitoring events. This enables advanced automation and custom workflows. It is ideal for technical users.

(34) AI Script Generator  
AI Script Generator allows you to create scripts using simple natural language. It removes the need for manual coding. This is perfect for beginners and intermediate users.

(35) Script Marketplace  
Script Marketplace provides ready-to-use automation scripts. Users can install and use them instantly without creating their own. This saves time and simplifies setup.

(36) Hotkeys  
Hotkeys allow you to control extension features using keyboard shortcuts. This speeds up workflow and reduces manual effort. They can be customized from settings.


🔹 Expression Tools

(37) Ready Expressions  
Ready Expressions provide pre-built monitoring patterns for common use cases. They help users get started quickly without writing complex logic. This is useful for both beginners and advanced users.

(38) AI Expression Generator  
AI Expression Generator allows you to create expressions using natural language. It can generate complex patterns like Regex automatically. This simplifies advanced monitoring setups.


🔹 Account & Sync

(39) Sync Settings  
Sync Settings allow you to synchronize all configurations across devices using your account. This ensures consistency and saves setup time. It requires a simple login with email and password.

(40) Primary Device  
Primary Device acts as the main control device. It manages all settings and configurations. Only one primary device is allowed per account.

(41) Secondary Devices  
Secondary Devices connect using a sync key without requiring login. They follow the configuration of the primary device. This makes multi-device setup easy.

(42) Settings Profiles  
Settings Profiles allow you to create multiple configurations for different use cases. You can assign profiles to devices as needed. This provides flexibility and better management.

⭐ Getting started
★ Open a webpage to be Refreshed or monitored.
★ Click the Auto Refresh Plus icon in the browser toolbar.
★ "Select the Time interval" and "Page Monitor " as needed for your case.
★ Click on "Start."
★ For more configuration, please check the extension settings page.

⭐ Use case
★ Competitive monitoring
★ Monitor Price changes
★ Monitor Job offers
★ Monitor Product availability
★ Media monitoring
★ Website error tracking
★ Track numeric data in graphs
★ And many more

⭐ Active Support Center
We deeply care for our users and are actively working on providing support and adding requested features. If you have a suggestion, a feature you would like to request, or need help with ARP, please leave a request in the support section.

⭐ Privacy Policy
•   We do not track any of your data, period.
•   We do not track any websites, website usage, etc.
•   We do not transfer any data to any 3rd party servers/internet
•   The only data that we store is your storage data. You save this data to your local browser storage. We never touch or see this data.
•   The extension uses Google Analytics to collect code error information anonymously to improve extension quality.

Feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns about data privacy; we will gladly help.

A zoomed eyedropper & color chooser tool that allows you to select color values from webpages and more.

If you feel the need to alert the developer about a bug use the feedback forum instead of writing a review.

Note: by default "Attempt to auto copy value to clipboard" disabled.  You will be warned during install about a request for clipboardWrite permissions, but this is disabled by default until you enable it in settings because automatically overwriting the clipboard may be annoying.  If you do use this setting you can decide whether to auto copy the hex or the rgb css.

ColorPick needs permission on all websites so that it is at the ready when you need it.  In order to use the tabs API this permission is required.  Color pick does not abuse this permission and is highly configurable.  You can always review the source code yourself, which is available online here https://github.com/qufighter/ColorPick PRs welcome!

Please note that colors are picked from a snapshot of the page that is updated only when you scroll.  To take a new snapshot press r or use the re-snap button.  Sometimes if you just changed tabs, you may see a snapshot error - this is an intentional security feature.  Press R or scroll to correct this, or exit color pick and try again.

As with most extensions of this nature, it will not work out of the box on the web store, or on file:// pages.  It will work on local file pages only after you "Allow access to file URLs" from the tools->extensions manager.  However there is also an alternative feature "snap mode" that uses the active tab permission to take a screenshot anyway, which is then sent to a new tab where permission to run the extension may be granted, however you will have to click the extension icon again on this new tab at present.

If you experience an issue, try the following:
 - Try a new website in a different tab and see if it works there
 - Try the same website in a new tab and see if that works
 - Reloading the extension or tab may sometimes be needed

If you need to operate on unsupported pages try the desktop app version (mac+pc) at color-pick.com or if you are selecting colors from screenshots, images or photos try the mobile phone/tablet app for IOS and Android - search the store for "ColorPick" (which also includes color based mini games).

If you're looking for a quick and easy to use color eye dropper with zoomed drag-able preview for fine tuning you've come to the right place.  If you experience any bugs PLEASE report them using the feedback button, I want to fix them if they can be fixed.

It has been reported that it may take a few tries before it starts working initially.  You may have to refresh the page or re-load the extension.  I have personally experienced bugs where mousemove event does not fire, etc, but then when I switch out of chrome and back, it starts working.  There is little that can be done to fix this except be patient and try again.

Keep in mind that your display's color space matters - if it or chrome is not set to sRGB (and restarted chrome) then some colors set to one value will pick as a different value (as if from a screenshot, which in some cases can have a similar effect).

Color Pick attempts to use lossless PNG quality to detect colors.  If you experience bugs or distorted snapshot of the page disable this feature to use JPEG quality.

If your business is using this extension or the desktop app than you should urge them to purchase the appropriate license.

Thank You,
Sam

-------------------------------------------
This program is a Color Picker, or an Eye Dropper, also a ColorPicker or EyeDroper depending on how you wish to spell it.  It also contains webpage region magnification/zoom loupe features.  Zoom features may help you to see pixel perfect alignment accuracy during web development adjustments. This extension may someday be supported by URL rewriting affiliate links.  This may be disabled from options and is disabled by default.  When you uninstall this extension you may be asked to complete a survey - you can disable this survey from options.

This extension is used to sign documents digitally inside the Certisign platform (www.portaldeassinaturas.com.br). You will need to have a digital certificate in order to sign your documents, if you do not have one, please visit our website www.certisign.com.br and check which certificate fit your needs better.

Pix is the French government's online public service for assessing, developing and certifying digital skills.

Within this framework, we organize certification sessions to validate users' digital skills. During these sessions, it is not permitted to consult certain prohibited content or to search for answers directly on the Internet.

The extension is designed to be used as part of a “Pix” certification test. Its purpose is to prevent access to websites prohibited by Pix. The filter is automatically activated at test start-up and deactivated at test end.

When attempting to navigate to a “prohibited” website, the user is redirected to an extension page.

A check is performed at each browsing event, as well as on tabs already open at the time of activation.

Bring learning into your everyday workflow with the Degreed button. You can track your learning from any website, share content with others, save for later, add to a Pathway, or search for content in Degreed without ever leaving the site you’re on. 

Track your learning: Track all your learning directly from your browser without leaving the page you’re on — and save comments about what you learned. 

Share with others: If you love what you learned, you can recommend it to a friend or a group. 

Save for later: If you find an article you want to read later, you can save it. If you forget, Degreed will recommend it in your feed.  

Add to Pathway or Plan: When building a Pathway or plan in Degreed, you can add to it directly from the Degreed Button. 

Add to catalog: If you have the “Manage Content” permission, you can add directly to the catalog. The Degreed Button will scrape the title, description, and image for the content if available, removing the need to manually add the information. You can also review and modify the title and description before the item is added to the catalog.

Find more learning resources: Find new learning resources and people to follow. If you want to learn more, search to see other learning items or find people to follow and see what they’re reading.  

Stay in touch with notifications: Your Degreed notifications are available directly. If someone recommends an item, you get notified without leaving the page you are on.

Easily create Web Cards in LoiLoNote School!

About LoiLo Web Card
LoiLo Web Card is a browser extension that makes it easy to create Web Cards—URL links with webpage snapshots.
Simply click the camera icon to create a Web Card.

Using the Web Card Extension
1. Pin the extension
After installing the Web Card extension, it needs to be pinned on each device.
① Click the puzzle piece icon in the top-right corner of the browser.
② Click the pin icon next to LoiLo Web Card to add it to the toolbar.
*When pinned, the icon turns blue.
2. Create a Web Card from a website
Open the website you want to save, then click the camera icon in the extension.
Choose a LoiLoNote note to save it to.

Notes
A destination note in LoiLoNote must be selected to save a Web Card.
The captured image may differ depending on how the website is structured.

The Glean browser extension unlocks your company’s knowledge and enables powerful work AI for everyone. Just hit Command + J or Alt + J on Windows to instantly access Glean from anywhere:

StayFocusd – Website Blocker & Focus Timer & Shorts Blocker
Boost your productivity by limiting the amount of time you spend on time-wasting websites.

You sit down at the computer, and you swear you'll be productive. Next thing you know, it's twelve hours later. You've checked your email, updated your Facebook status, blown through 200 pages of Reddit, read every article in your Twitter feed, looked up your favorite band on Wikipedia, vanity googled yourself, cyber-stalked your ex, browsed through all your high-school crushes' Instagram feeds, and lost a week's pay playing online poker.

What you haven't done is WORK.

✦ What is StayFocusd?

StayFocusd, by Sensor Tower, is a productivity extension for Google Chrome that helps you stay focused on work by restricting the amount of time you can spend on time-wasting websites. It provides analytics to help you understand and control your internet usage, ensuring you remain productive throughout the day.

⭐ Our Features ⭐

📊 Website usage history: Get statistics of your daily website usage history.
🚫 Configurable blocking: Block entire sites, specific subdomains, specific paths, specific pages, or even in-page content (videos, images, forms, etc).
☢️ The Nuclear Option: This powerful feature allows you to block access to websites for the number of hours you specify on the days you choose. Once activated, it cannot be canceled, ensuring you remain focused and productive.
📱Require Challenge: To change any settings, you must complete a challenging task. This reduces the temptation to alter settings, helping you stick to your productivity goals.
🗓️ Active Days/Hours: Customize the days and hours during which StayFocusd will restrict your access to distracting websites. This ensures that your productivity is maintained during critical work periods.
▶️ In App Blocking: Block all distracting components on YouTube and other major social media platforms. Hide shorts, comments, recommended videos, and more.
🤖 Gen AI Analytics: Track and analyze your usage of AI chat platforms directly from the StayFocusd.
🔒 Privacy protection: StayFocusd does not collect personal data from the web pages you visit.
🔗 Sync Usage Limits across devices: Connect Android devices and other browsers to view website and mobile app usage and limits in one place.

✦ YOU ARE IMPORTANT

We value your feedback! Please rate us 5 stars on the Chrome Web Store to help us grow. Problems? Questions? Suggestions? Effusive praise? Email support@stayfocusd.com

PRIVACY NOTICE:
When you install StayFocusd, it will ask you to grant a number of permissions, including “Read and change all your data on the websites you visit.” This permission is required in order for StayFocusd to run on any site which you may visit—without this permission, StayFocusd would not be able to block websites. While this permission technically grants StayFocusd the ability to read and change data, we will never collect personal data from the web page content that you are browsing.

An extension that allows viewing of locally published Axure RP prototypes (HTML files) from Google Chrome.

Add this extension to view locally published prototypes (HTML files) created from Axure RP in Google Chrome.

This extension requires a high access level to allow the viewing of the file:// protocol. This extension only requires these permissions to allow viewing of prototypes in Chrome - Axure does not track or access any of your information.

IMPORTANT: After installing the extension you must check the setting "Allow access to file URLs". You can access this by going to: Tools > Extensions > Axure RP Extension for Chrome from the Chrome > Preferences menu.

This extension allows you to view Axure RP prototypes in Google Chrome. It is not used to open Axure RP project files (.rp, .rpteam) for editing in Google Chrome.

You do not have to install this extension if you want to view prototypes hosted on the web. For example, you don't need this to view prototypes from Axure Cloud (app.axure.cloud) or Axure Cloud for Business (axure.com/enterprise). 

If you have any issues or questions, please email support@axure.com To download the latest version of Axure RP or a free 30-day trial, visit axure.com/download.

Powerful Extension To Extract E-Mail ID's Automatically From Web Pages. NEW FEATURES: AutoVisit websites and AutoSave Email IDs.

Find email addresses in seconds.

Email Extractor is a powerful email extraction extension for Chrome. Extension automatically fetches valid email IDs from the web page, you can copy paste particular email ids you need or export all of them to a text or CSV file. 

NEW FEATURE 1 : the new automation tool can discovers all email addresses for a specific domain name. Example: if you want to discover email IDs of people working at Email Hunter, you can step the tool to search for any email address ending with hunter.io or emailhunter.io , this job can be done for any website.

NEW FEATURE 2 : you can add a 5 seconds delay when visiting web pages automatically, so you make sure all pages are loaded and all email ID’s are collected, even when JavaScript are delaying the display of the emails ID's.

AUTOMATION with AutoVisit and AutoSave. How it works:
** Automation: allows you to build a queue of up to 1.000 URL that you want to visit. The tool will launch a robot that will visit the requested pages and extract all email addresses found on those webpages.
** AutoSave: this feature will store, in the cloud, all the email IDs found on all the pages you are visiting. 

This plugin fetches email ids from the Source Code and has no relevance to what you see on the front, so for example, if you see 3 email ids on the website, plugin may fetch more if it finds hidden email ids in the source.

Features:
- AutoVisit: build a queue of URL that you want to visit automatically
- Automation: discover all email ID's ending with a specific domain name
- Extract Email Address from Web Pages Automatically
- Auto-save all Email Address in the cloud while you browse any website (cloud storage starting at $9.99/month)
- share your Premium subscription with your colleagues
- Download stored Email IDs
- Extracts Emails on Ajax Pages as well, for example Google Search
- Extracts Cloaked Emails
- Filters for Duplicate Email ID, so you get only Unique ones
- Local Storage
- Export Option to export list of your extracted emails to a text file
- Offline Support (Added as of v1.6 Beta) Needs permission
- Extract Emails from Local HTML Documents
- Extract Emails from Text Files
- Fast, Light(Only 51KB)
- removes duplicate email addresses
- See instructions at: https://www.email-extractor.io/assets/pdf/Email_Extractor-FAQ.pdf

No crappy advertisements, no extra junk.

Pricing: this extension is an inexpensive alternative to Email Hunter , voila norbert , Clearbit Connect or FTL ( find that lead ). On the other hand, you will need a bit of technical knowledge to configure. TIP: use our recommended "recipes"

Note that the extracted ids will be overwritten if you open a new tab and browse to a new page, for this particular situation, switch to the previous tab, plugin will fetch the ids, and you can export them.

Though this plugin accesses your web page information, the only thing which will be extracted is the email ids and that too are stored in your local storage.

Extension is thoroughly tested, if incase anyone encounters any bug, you can get my contact details when you click the "Gear" button on the plugin and I'll make sure its fixed ASAP.

Informal Disclaimer : This extension is not developed with an intention to spam people with your marketing mails, so use it for your personal stuff only.

Manage your Polkadot accounts outside of dapps. Injects the accounts and allows signing transactions for a specific account.

Manage your Polkadot accounts outside of applications built on Substrate (https://github.com/paritytech/substrate), Polkadot (https://polkadot.network/ and Kusama (https://kusama.network/). This extension injects the accounts and allows signing of messages and transactions for a specific account, without making the account secrets available to the calling app.

This allows you to manage your accounts, without storing it is the browser site-specific localStorage, for use on applications such as https://polkadot.js.org/apps/. It does not allow for full wallet capability, but rather is laser focussed on only managing your accounts and providing signing capabilities to applications requesting access. As such, its prime purpose is managing the accounts and injecting them as per the standard extension interfaces, as described in https://github.com/polkadot-js/extension#api-interface.

It allows you to -

- Add accounts, storing the account secrets in your extension storage
- Allow application access to the signing capabilities of these accounts (you can accept/reject requests)
- Allows you to sign transactions for Substrate, Polkadot and Kusama networks
- In all of this no secretes leave the extension, only the signature is ever provided

The source for this extension is fully available, with the latest versions always matching up with the source repo at https://github.com/polkadot-js/extension
SYSTRAN Translator can translate any webpage in one click.

Translate any webpage in one click with SYSTRAN Translator!

The extension helps you translate all your web browsing content into the language of your choice with the best quality and precision. Choose a method depending on your need and benefit from our fast machine translations:

•   Translate a text selection
Select any text on your page then click on the SYSTRAN Translator icon to instantly see the translation.
>> You can also right-click on your selection and choose "Translate selection with Systran" in order to get your translation in a new tab.

•   Translate a full page
Select a target language and click on “Translate This Page”, then the translation will progressively display the translated page while keeping the formatting. You can then switch easily between the original text and translation.
>> You can also activate the Auto-translation to keep translating while navigating the web with a preference mode (auto-translation to be enabled tab by tab or for all new tabs).

•   Translate some text input
You want a translation for a sentence you have in mind while surfing the web without leaving your browser? Then directly enter some text in the translate box of the extension and visualize the translation instantly.

You can change the source and target language anytime to tailor the translation to your needs.
To use Systran Translator, you need a SYSTRAN Translate or SPNS account. Learn more about SYSTRAN Products and check our latest blog post at https://www.systran.net/

SYSTRAN Translate users have access to 50 languages (https://www.systran.net/en/features/)

This extension adds a dedicated icon to your browser toolbar, you can pin it to keep it at your fingertips and quickly use it whenever you need it.

NB. Some limitations apply: Images and iframe are currently not supported for translation.

Privacy Extension For WhatsApp Web - WABULK
Protect your privacy on WhatsApp Web, lock your screen, and hide messages, images, profile, and more with blur effects.

Privacy Extension for WhatsApp Web offers privacy protection features that allow you to lock your screen and selectively hide messages, images, profile, and more. With this extension, you can safeguard your conversations on WA Web and prevent unauthorized access or prying eyes.


# Feature
✅ Screen lock: The Lock Screen feature requires a password to access WhatsApp Web, ensuring that your messages and conversations remain private even when you're away from your computer. You can also set a time limit for automatic lock screen activation.
✅ Message hiding: The Hidden Chat Messages feature allows you to blur out certain content, which can only be revealed by hovering over it with your mouse. This feature includes six independent toggles: Users/Group Names, Profile Pictures, Last Message Preview, All Messages in Chat, Media Preview, and Text Input.
✅ Convenience: Use keyboard shortcuts to quickly turn on/off screen lock and message hiding features, making it easy to use.

The Lock Screen shortcut key is Alt+X, and the overall toggle for Hidden Chat Messages is Alt+Z. You can customize these shortcuts in chrome://extensions/shortcuts.


# Home Page
https://privacy-wa-web.wabulk.net/

We're here to help! For any questions or feedback, contact us at info@wabulk.net.
